analytics: Always filter partitioned tables by the 'dt' partition column to avoid full scans.
Transaction status values are: completed, pending, refunded, failed.
Payment methods are: credit_card, pix, boleto.
Event types include: click, view, purchase, signup.
Amount is always in BRL (Brazilian Real).
Use dt in format YYYY-MM-DD for date partitions.
The 'users' and 'products' tables are not partitioned — full scans are acceptable for these.
Always use 'completed' status when calculating revenue to exclude refunds and failed transactions.
Device types are: mobile, desktop, tablet.
User plans are: free, pro, enterprise.
